name: Massey's BBQ
description:
🏓 Pickleball Fun at Massey’s BBQ! 🏓Looking for a fun day with the family? Our pickleball courts are located right by the Massey's BBQ Glen Rose pavilion! 🌞 Bring the whole crew – there’s plenty of room for kids to play while you enjoy a few rounds on the court. Afterward, refuel with some of our mouth-watering BBQ and try our NEW MENU. We have something for every appetite.  It’s the perfect spot for food, family, and fun! 🐷

Come on out and make some memories at Massey's!
